AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HAMEL, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT MAYER, IVY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMEL, GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYER, IVY $4,244.15 PRINCIPAL, $174.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,418.15, THE COURT DOES NOT ORDER RECOVERY FOR DIMINISHED VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY AND WAGE LOSS. DEFENDANT IVY MAYER NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
